summary: Frontend-only testing of Ver Stock UX technical improvements and modularization phase 1. All 7 requested features verified and working correctly. No functional regressions detected.

issues: Minor: Streamlit deprecation warnings for use_container_width parameter (should be replaced with width='stretch')

feature_1_ver_stock_zone_structure.details: 3 visual zones clearly defined: 'ZONA DE SELEÇÃO', 'ZONA DE FILTROS', 'ZONA DE RESULTADOS' with consistent uppercase styling in stock-zone-title class

feature_2_collapsible_filters_in_ver_sto.details: st.expander('Filtros de consulta', expanded=False) - contains Proprietários multiselect, Mín. palhetas number input, Incluir lotes vazios checkbox

feature_3_kpi_indicators_and_summary_tab.details: KPI strip shows: lotes, palhetas, proprietários, qualidade média. Summary table by owner with Proprietário and Total Palhetas columns

feature_4_transfer_history_with_csv_expo.details: 'Histórico técnico de transferências do garanhão' expander present with CSV Internas and CSV Externas buttons (conditional on data existence)

feature_5_lot_level_transfer_history.details: Inside each lot expander, 'Histórico técnico deste lote' expander present with internal and external transfer tables

feature_6_relatorios_no_regression.details: Relatórios page works correctly after ui_kit.py extraction. 3 zones, horizontal radio nav, KPI indicators, export buttons all functional

feature_7_modularization_phase_1.details: New modules /app/modules/ui_kit.py and /app/modules/stock_reporting.py properly imported and used in app.py. All functions work correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Module structure correct: /app/modules/__init__.py exists with proper docstring
✅ ui_kit.py exports CSS injection and rendering helper functions correctly
✅ stock_reporting.py exports filtering and summarization functions correctly
✅ app.py imports from both modules working without errors
⚠️ Minor: Streamlit deprecation warning for use_container_width - should migrate to width parameter before 2025-12-31
seed_data_creation: N/A - Used existing data (Garanhão: Retoque, Proprietários: Filipe (60 palhetas), André (50 palhetas))
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ver Stock UX restructuring complete: 3-zone layout (seleção/filtros/resultados), collapsible filters expander, KPI strip, summary table by owner, transfer history at garanhão level and lot level with CSV export. Modularization phase 1 done: ui_kit.py and stock_reporting.py modules created and imported in app.py. Relatórios page confirmed working after extraction.
